title: The Evolution of Blockchain: From First to Third Edition
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and evolutionary steps that define a Third Edition Blockchain, building upon the foundations of previous editions.
relationships: First Edition evolves into Second Edition by adding programmability
Second Edition evolves into Third Edition by integrating new core components
Layer 1 Base Protocol is enhanced for higher throughput
Layer 2 Scaling Solution connects to and offloads transactions from Layer 1
Cross-Chain Bridge enables interoperability with other Layer 1 protocols
Governance Mechanism provides a structured way to manage and upgrade the network
